'''kazhawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidalga|hidalga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidalga|hidalga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kazhawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzhæwæth|kæzhæwæth]] || [[word:kæzhæwæj|kæzhæwæj]] || [[word:kæzhæwæsh|kæzhæwæsh]] || [[word:kæzhæwæ|kæzhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazhazhawath|kazhazhawath]] || [[word:kazhazhawaj|kazhazhawaj]] || [[word:kazhazhawash|kazhazhawash]] || [[word:kazhazhawa|kazhazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazhawath|kazhawath]] || [[word:kazhawaj|kazhawaj]] || [[word:kazhawash|kazhawash]] || [[word:kazhawa|kazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazhafwath|kazhafwath]] || [[word:kazhafwaj|kazhafwaj]] || [[word:kazhafwash|kazhafwash]] || [[word:kazhafwaf|kazhafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazhawatha|kazhawatha]] || [[word:kazhawaja|kazhawaja]] || [[word:kazhawasha|kazhawasha]] || [[word:kazhawaka|kazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazhawath|kazhawath]] || [[word:kazhawaj|kazhawaj]] || [[word:kazhawash|kazhawash]] || [[word:kazhawa|kazhawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazhawathal|kazhawathal]] || [[word:kazhawajal|kazhawajal]] || [[word:kazhawashal|kazhawashal]] || [[word:kazhawakal|kazhawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazhawathatha|kazhawathatha]] || [[word:kazhawajaja|kazhawajaja]] || [[word:kazhawashasha|kazhawashasha]] || [[word:kazhawaka|kazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazhawathan|kazhawathan]] || [[word:kazhawajan|kazhawajan]] || [[word:kazhawashan|kazhawashan]] || [[word:kazhawakan|kazhawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazhawathaoro|kazhawathaoro]] || [[word:kazhawajaoro|kazhawajaoro]] || [[word:kazhawashaoro|kazhawashaoro]] || [[word:kazhawakaoro|kazhawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
